Package com.cloudbees.syslog.sender

Class AbstractSyslogMessageSender

java.lang.Object
com.cloudbees.syslog.sender.AbstractSyslogMessageSender
All Implemented Interfaces:
SyslogMessageSender
Direct Known Subclasses:
TcpSyslogMessageSender, UdpSyslogMessageSender
public abstract class AbstractSyslogMessageSender extends Object implements SyslogMessageSender
Author:
Cyrille Le Clerc
